title: Delicate Norwegian Dumplings
description: A traditional Norwegian recipe made with delicate dumplings and a flavorful broth.
instructions: Combine flour and rice in a large bowl.
Add delicate herbs and mix well.
Gradually add water and stir until dough forms.
Divide dough into small pieces and shape into dumplings.
Bring a large pot of water to a boil.
Gently add dumplings to the boiling water.
Cook for 15 minutes or until dumplings float to the surface.
Serve with a flavorful broth made by simmering norwegian spices and salt in water.
